name: @overlord/webapp
description: Overlord realtime web control center (REST + realtime API backed by the local SQLite database, plus the React SPA that consumes it).

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test server/load-repo-env.test.ts server/project-resources.test.ts server/title-automation.test.ts server/mission-ref.test.ts server/workspace-settings.test.ts server/workspaces.test.ts server/workspaces.postgres-conformance.test.ts server/my-missions.test.ts server/objectives.test.ts server/launch.test.ts server/branch-planning.test.ts server/branch-prepared.test.ts server/branch-status.test.ts server/branch-actions.test.ts server/branch-selection-worktrees.test.ts server/local-target-capability.test.ts server/local-target-invoke.test.ts server/mission-worktree-preference.test.ts server/generate-commit-message.test.ts server/storage-backends.test.ts server/storage.test.ts server/serve-spa.test.ts web/lib/local-target-client.test.ts web/lib/realtime-invalidation.test.ts web/lib/native-workflow-notifications.test.ts web/lib/project-resources.test.ts
